# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Input: JSON Format (external_references types)
# Allowed types (CycloneDX):
#   website, vcs, documentation, issue-tracker, distribution, support,
#   release-notes, advisories, other

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format cyclonedx --spec-version 1.6 -o out.json

# Confirm every declared type round-trips
exec jq -e '[.components[0].externalReferences[].type] | contains(["website","vcs","documentation","issue-tracker","distribution","support","release-notes","advisories","other"])' out.json

# --- Artifact-level external refs ---
exec jq -e '[.metadata.component.externalReferences[].type] | contains(["vcs","release-notes","advisories"])' out.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
  external_refs:
    - type: vcs
      url: https://github.com/acme/app
    - type: release-notes
      url: https://acme.example/releases
    - type: advisories
      url: https://acme.example/advisories
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    { "name": "lib", "version": "1.0.0", "type": "library", "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name":"a"},
      "hashes":[{"algorithm":"SHA-256","value":"1111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111111"}],
      "external_references": [
        { "type": "website", "url": "https://x.example/lib" },
        { "type": "vcs", "url": "https://github.com/x/lib" },
        { "type": "documentation", "url": "https://x.example/docs" },
        { "type": "issue-tracker", "url": "https://github.com/x/lib/issues" },
        { "type": "distribution", "url": "https://x.example/dl/lib.tar.gz" },
        { "type": "support", "url": "https://x.example/support" },
        { "type": "release-notes", "url": "https://x.example/changelog" },
        { "type": "advisories", "url": "https://x.example/cves" },
        { "type": "other", "url": "https://x.example/other" }
      ] }
  ]
}
